## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential role and company vision with Mariana Chozas for fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is growing rapidly, aiming for 3-4M ARR by year-end with 40 clients](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Key focus areas: hiring/vetting, training, sales, client onboarding, ops automation](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Immediate need: COO-type role to run business operations, build scalable processes](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Company culture prioritizes work-life balance, family involvement, and achievement](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Vision

  - [Current ARR: \~$2-3M with 20 clients; aiming for $3-4M by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=2937.0)
  - [Pipeline: 20 deals worth potential $2-3M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=2937.0)
  - [2024 goal: Reach $11-15M ARR by closing 2 clients/week](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
  - [Considering $2-3M angel round vs. larger VC round for tech platform](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)

### Operational Challenges and Needs

  - [Urgent need for COO-type role to manage business operations](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Key areas: legal, accounting, HR, invoicing, team building](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Goal: Build scalable processes for 100-1000+ client operations](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Example: Automated hiring workflow using AI for initial screening](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)

### Work Culture and Balance

  - [Emphasis on work-life balance and family involvement](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=2737.0)
  - [Flexible work arrangements, occasional intense periods balanced with breaks](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=2737.0)
  - [Open to travel and in-person meetings for relationship building](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=2737.0)
  - [Encourages mixing work and personal life for stronger team bonds](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=2737.0)

### Mariana's Experience and Potential Fit

  - [Built processes from scratch in current role (e.g., onboarding, payroll)](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Comfortable with rapid growth and constant process iteration](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Potential areas of focus: running the business, operational improvements](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Aligns with company's startup mentality and growth mindset](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Technology and Innovation

  - [Developing AI-powered workflows for internal processes and client work](https://fathom.video/share/rpu4DCGNm5rgQF6M2x7b_zVd9k4xZ5Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=2884.0)
